title: Stacks, Queues, Deques, and Monotonic Structures · Mastery Check
summary: Coordinate undo history, request scheduling, and sliding-window alerts. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a suite of bounded linear abstract data types. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define stack, queue, and deque behavior independently from implementation details.
Apply LIFO state to parsing, undo, traversal, and nested-delimiter validation.
Apply FIFO ordering with bounded capacity and explicit overload behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process
steps.instruction: Order the Adt Contracts correctness-and-cost proof for this quiz task before implementing it.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Adt Contracts assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward.
